verses.geez: ወሐወጻ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሳራ ፡ ወበከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ላቲ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord visited Sarrha, as he said, and the Lord did to Sarrha, as he spoke.
translations.kjv: And the LORD visited Sarah as he had said, and the LORD did unto Sarah as he had spoken.

verses.geez: ወፀንሰት ፡ ሳራ ፡ ወወለደት ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ወልደ ፡ በርሥዐቲሁ ፡ በመዋዕል ፡ ዘይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And she conceived and bore to Abraam a son in old age, at the set time according as the Lord spoke to him.
translations.kjv: For Sarah conceived, and bare Abraham a son in his old age, at the set time of which God had spoken to him.

verses.geez: ወሰመዮ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ይስሐቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam called the name of his son that was born to him, whom Sarrha bore to him, Isaac.
translations.kjv: And Abraham called the name of his son that was born unto him, whom Sarah bare to him, Isaac.

verses.geez: ወገዘሮ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዱ ፡ በሳ[ምን]ት ፡ ዕለት ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam circumcised Isaac on the eighth day, as God commanded him.
translations.kjv: And Abraham circumcised his son Isaac being eight days old, as God had commanded him.

verses.geez: ወአብርሃምሰ ፡ ፻ዓመቱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አመ ፡ ተወልደ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ይስሐቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam was a hundred years old when Isaac his son was born to him.
translations.kjv: And Abraham was an hundred years old, when his son Isaac was born unto him.

verses.geez: ወትቤ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ሠሐቀ ፡ ረሰየኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘይሰምዕ ፡ ይትፌሣሕ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And Sarrha said, The Lord has made laughter for me, for whoever shall hear shall rejoice with me.
translations.kjv: And Sarah said, God hath made me to laugh, so that all that hear will laugh with me.

verses.geez: ወትቤ ፡ መኑ ፡ እምዜነዎ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ከመ ፡ ተሐፅን ፡ ሳራ ፡ ሕፃነ ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ በርሥአቲሃ ።

translations.lxx: And she said, Who shall say to Abraam that Sarrha suckles a child? for I have born a child in my old age.
translations.kjv: And she said, Who would have said unto Abraham, that Sarah should have given children suck? for I have born him a son in his old age.

verses.geez:
ወልህቀ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ወአኅደግዎ ፡ ጥበ ፡ ወገብረ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ማዕደ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ በዕለተ ፡ አኅደግዎ ፡ ጥበ ፡
                  [ለይስሐቅ ።]

translations.lxx: And the child grew and was weaned, and Abraam made a great feast the day that his son Isaac was weaned.
translations.kjv: And the child grew, and was weaned: and Abraham made a great feast the same day that Isaac was weaned.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ርእየቶ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ለወልደ ፡ አጋር ፡ ግብጻዊት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይትዌነይ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዳ ፤

translations.lxx: And Sarrha having seen the son of Agar the Egyptian who was born to Abraam, sporting with Isaac her son,
translations.kjv: And Sarah saw the son of Hagar the Egyptian, which she had born unto Abraham, mocking.

verses.geez:
ትቤሎ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ አውጽኣ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ አመት ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወልዳ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢይወርስ ፡ ወልዳ ፡ ለአመት ፡
                  ምስለ ፡ ወልድየ ፡ ይስሐቅ ።

translations.lxx: then she said to Abraam, Cast out this bondwoman and her son, for the son of this bondwoman shall not inherit with my son Isaac.
translations.kjv: Wherefore she said unto Abraham, Cast out this bondwoman and her son: for the son of this bondwoman shall not be heir with my son, even with Isaac.

verses.geez: ወዕጹበ ፡ ኮኖ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ በቅድሜሁ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ጥቀ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ወልዱ ።

translations.lxx: But the word appeared very hard before Abraam concerning his son.
translations.kjv: And the thing was very grievous in Abraham’s sight because of his son.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ኢይኩንከ ፡ ዕጹበ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  አመት ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘትቤለከ ፡ ስምዓ ፡ ለሳራ ፡ እስመ ፡ እምነ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ይትኌለቍ ፡ ለከ ፡ ዘርእ ።

translations.lxx: But God said to Abraam, Let it not be hard before thee concerning the child, and concerning the bondwoman; in all things whatsoever Sarrha shall say to thee, hear her voice, for in Isaac shall thy seed be called.
translations.kjv: And God said unto Abraham, Let it not be grievous in thy sight because of the lad, and because of thy bondwoman; in all that Sarah hath said unto thee, hearken unto her voice; for in Isaac shall thy seed be called.

verses.geez: ወለወልዳሰ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ አመት ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ እሬስዮ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘርአ ፡ ዚአከ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And moreover I will make the son of this bondwoman a great nation, because he is thy seed.
translations.kjv: And also of the son of the bondwoman will I make a nation, because he is thy seed.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ወሳእረ ፡ ማይ ፡ ወወሀባ ፡ ለአጋር ፡ ወአንበረ ፡ ዲበ ፡
                  መትከፍታ ፡ ወሕፃነኒ ፡ ወፈነዋ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ሖረት ፡ ወሳኰየት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam rose up in the morning and took loaves and a skin of water, and gave them to Agar, and he put the child on her shoulder, and sent her away, and she having departed wandered in the wilderness near the well of the oath.
translations.kjv: And Abraham rose up early in the morning, and took bread, and a bottle of water, and gave it unto Hagar, putting it on her shoulder, and the child, and sent her away: and she departed, and wandered in the wilderness of Beersheba.

verses.geez: ወሐልቀ ፡ ማያሂ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ሳእራ ፡ ወገደፈቶ ፡ ለሕፃና ፡ ታሕተ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ዕፅ ።

translations.lxx: And the water failed out of the skin, and she cast the child under a fir tree.
translations.kjv: And the water was spent in the bottle, and she cast the child under one of the shrubs.

verses.geez:
ወሖረት ፡ ወነበረት ፡ ትነጽሮ ፡ እምርኁቅ ፡ ከመ ፡ ምንዳፈ ፡ ሐጽ ፡ እስመ ፡ ትቤ ፡ ኢይርአይ ፡ ሞቶ ፡ ለሕፃንየ ፡
                  ወበከየት ።

translations.lxx: And she departed and sat down opposite him at a distance, as it were a bow-shot, for she said, Surely I cannot see the death of my child: and she sat opposite him, and the child cried aloud and wept.
translations.kjv: And she went, and sat her down over against him a good way off, as it were a bow shot: for she said, Let me not see the death of the child. And she sat over against him, and lift up her voice, and wept.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አውያቶ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ እምነ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ወጸውዐ ፡ መልአከ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአጋር ፡ እምሰማይ ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ኮንኪ ፡ አጋር ፡ ኢትፍርሂ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቃሎ
                  ፡ ለሕፃንኪ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀሎ ።

translations.lxx: And God heard the voice of the child from the place where he was, and an angel of God called Agar out of heaven, and said to her, What is it, Agar? fear not, for God has heard the voice of the child from the place where he is.
translations.kjv: And God heard the voice of the lad; and the angel of God called to Hagar out of heaven, and said unto her, What aileth thee, Hagar? fear not; for God hath heard the voice of the lad where he is.

verses.geez: ተንሥኢ ፡ ወንሥኢ ፡ ሕፃነኪ ፡ ወአጽንዕዮ ፡ በእዴኪ ፡ [እስመ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ እሬስዮ ።]

translations.lxx: Rise up, and take the child, and hold him in thine hand, for I will make him a great nation.
translations.kjv: Arise, lift up the lad, and hold him in thine hand; for I will make him a great nation.

verses.geez:
ወፈትሐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አዕይንቲሃ ፡ ለአጋር ፡ ወርእየት ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ጥዑም ፡ ወሖረት ፡ ወመልአት ፡ ሳእራ ፡
                  ማየ ፡ ወአስተየቶ ፡ ለሕፃና ።

translations.lxx: And God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of springing water; and she went and filled the skin with water, and gave the child drink.
translations.kjv: And God opened her eyes, and she saw a well of water; and she went, and filled the bottle with water, and gave the lad drink.

verses.geez: ወሀሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕፃን ፡ ወልህቀ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ነደፌ ፤

translations.lxx: And God was with the child, and he grew and dwelt in the wilderness, and became an archer.
translations.kjv: And God was with the lad; and he grew, and dwelt in the wilderness, and became an archer.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅለ ፡ ፋራን ፡ ወነሥአት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And he dwelt in the wilderness, and his mother took him a wife out of Pharan of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And he dwelt in the wilderness of Paran: and his mother took him a wife out of the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ በእማንቱ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ይቤ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ወአኮዘት ፡ መጋቤ ፡ መራዕይሁ ፡ ወፋኮል ፡ መልአከ ፡ ሰርዌሁ ፡
                  ይቤልዎ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ዘገበርከ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass at that time that Abimelech spoke, and Ochozath his friend, and Phichol the chief captain of his host, to Abraam, saying, God is with thee in all things, whatsoever thou mayest do.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass at that time, that Abimelech and Phichol the chief captain of his host spake unto Abraham, saying, God is with thee in all that thou doest:

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ መሐል ፡ ለነ ፡ በእግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትዔምፀነ ፡ ወኢለዘርእየ ፡ ወኢለዘ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ አላ ፡ በከመ ፡
                  መጻእከ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወገበርኩ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ወለምድርየኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሀለው[ከ] ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: Now therefore swear to me by God that thou wilt not injure me, nor my seed, nor my name, but according to the righteousness which I have performed with thee thou shalt deal with me, and with the land in which thou hast sojourned.
translations.kjv: Now therefore swear unto me here by God that thou wilt not deal falsely with me, nor with my son, nor with my son’s son: but according to the kindness that I have done unto thee, thou shalt do unto me, and to the land wherein thou hast sojourned.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ኦሆ ፡ እምሕል ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam said, I will swear.
translations.kjv: And Abraham said, I will swear.

verses.geez: ወተዛለፌ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘሄድዎ ፡ ደቀ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam reproved Abimelech because of the wells of water, which the servants of Abimelech took away.
translations.kjv: And Abraham reproved Abimelech because of a well of water, which Abimelech’s servants had violently taken away.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ኢያእመርኩ ፡ መኑ ፡ ገብሮ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ግብር ፡ ወአንተኒ ፡ ኢያይዳዕከኒ ፡ ወአነኒ ፡ ኢሰማዕኩ
                  ፡ እንበለ ፡ ዮም ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech said to him, I know not who has done this thing to thee, neither didst thou tell it me, neither heard I it but only to-day.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech said, I wot not who hath done this thing: neither didst thou tell me, neither yet heard I of it, but to day.

verses.geez: ወነሥአ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አልህምተ ፡ ወአባግዐ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ ለአቤሜሌክ ፡ ወተማሐሉ ፡ በበይናቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam took sheep and calves, and gave them to Abimelech, and both made a covenant.
translations.kjv: And Abraham took sheep and oxen, and gave them unto Abimelech; and both of them made a covenant.

verses.geez: ወአቀመ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ሰብዑ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቶን ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam set seven ewe-lambs by themselves.
translations.kjv: And Abraham set seven ewe lambs of the flock by themselves.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እላ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ሰብዑ ፡ እለ ፡ አቀምኮን ፡ እንተ ፡ ባሕቲቶን
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech said to Abraam, What are these seven ewe-lambs which thou hast set alone?
translations.kjv: And Abimelech said unto Abraham, What mean these seven ewe lambs which thou hast set by themselves?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ እላንተ ፡ ሰብዑ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ንሣእ ፡ እምላዕሌየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይኩናኒ ፡ ስምዐ ፡ ከመ ፡ ከረይክዋ
                  ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam said, Thou shalt receive the seven ewe-lambs of me, that they may be for me as a witness, that I dug this well.
translations.kjv: And he said, For these seven ewe lambs shalt thou take of my hand, that they may be a witness unto me, that I have digged this well.

verses.geez: ወበእንተዝ ፡ ሰመይዎ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ፡ እስመ ፡ በህየ ፡ ተማሐሉ ፡ በበይናቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: Therefore he named the name of that place, The Well of the Oath, for there they both swore.
translations.kjv: Wherefore he called that place Beersheba; because there they sware both of them.

verses.geez:
ወተካየዱ ፡ ኪዳነ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ወአኮዘት ፡ መጋቤ ፡ መራዕይሁ ፡ ወፋኮል ፡
                  መልአከ ፡ ሰርዌሁ ፡ ወተመይጡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ፍልስጥኤም ።

translations.lxx: And they made a covenant at the well of the oath. And there rose up Abimelech, Ochozath his friend, and Phichol the commander-in-chief of his army, and they returned to the land of the Phylistines.
translations.kjv: Thus they made a covenant at Beersheba: then Abimelech rose up, and Phichol the chief captain of his host, and they returned into the land of the Philistines.

verses.geez:
ወዘርአ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ገራህተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወጸውዐ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ በህየ ፡ ስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ዘለዓለም ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam planted a field at the well of the oath, and called there on the name of the Lord, the everlasting God.
translations.kjv: And Abraham planted a grove in Beersheba, and called there on the name of the LORD, the everlasting God.

verses.geez: ወነበረ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ፍልስጥኤም ፡ ብዙኃ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam sojourned in the land of the Phylistines many days.
translations.kjv: And Abraham sojourned in the Philistines’ land many days.
